summary: The source permits at most ten distinct letters, so the complete assignment search is bounded by the fixed decimal digit set and cannot support an honest asymptotic runtime scaling verdict.

workload_bound.source_constraint: Across all words and the result there are at most ten distinct uppercase letters.

replacement_checks.evidence: Each letter is assigned at most once along a branch, distinct assignments are digit permutations, and therefore at most 10! complete assignments exist.
Regression compares the reference with an independent coefficient-and-permutation oracle on smaller puzzles and checks satisfiable and impossible ten-letter boundaries.
